bird.name: Rufous-bellied kookaburra
bird.summary: The rufous-bellied kookaburra (Dacelo gaudichaud), originally known as Gaudichaud's kookaburra after French botanist Charles Gaudichaud-Bea…

relations.subject: Rufous-bellied kookaburra
relations.evidence: Rufous-bellied kookaburras can be found in the middle story of the tropical rainforest, where they fly out directly and swiftly from their perch to seize large insects from trees. Despite their direct flight, rufous-bellied kookaburras are capable of very sharp twists and turns around the dense trees that form their habitat
relations.object_summary: 结构复杂且冠层完整的高生物多样性森林。
